heading: Access to books, documents, etc., for purpose of audit
label: 1435 Access to books, documents, etc., for purpose of audit
text: Every contract for loans or annual contributions under the United States Housing Act of 1937, as amended [ et seq.], shall provide that the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development and the Comptroller General of the United States, or any of their duly authorized representatives, shall, for the purpose of audit and examination, have access to any books, documents, papers, and records of the public housing agency entering into such contract that are pertinent to its operations with respect to financial assistance under the United States Housing Act of 1937, as amended.42 U.S.C. 1437
